title: Agent runners profiles manifest
description: Product-level profile templates the portal Create-Agent wizard offers. A profile picks a runner variant (variants.json) + default roles and gives it a role-centric name/description. The portal vendors this file; agent-runners is the single source of truth.

default.description: Default profile slug pre-selected in the wizard. MUST be one of profiles[].slug.

order.description: Dropdown order. MUST list every profiles[].slug exactly once.

aliases.description: Legacy slug → canonical slug, e.g. 'claude-code-headless' → 'swe-native'. The portal canonicalises on resolve + display so persisted rows keep working after a rename.

name.description: Role-centric template name shown in the wizard dropdown + consolidated profile block.

description.description: One-line stack description (helper text + row sub-line).

runner.description: Variant name from variants.json this profile installs onto.

default_roles.description: Roles seeded into agents.capabilities when the wizard omits an explicit roles[] override.

extras.description: Reserved for user-editable templates — empty for the seed catalogue (chips are variant-derived).
